retry_reason: refcount_dec_and_test always decrements unconditionally; no failure path for the put itself.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that decrements the reference count of the vma. When the refcount reaches zero (last reference released), it performs comprehensive cleanup: unpins the associated buffer object (if via DPT or ggtt node removal), and finally frees the vma structure. After calling this function, the caller must not access the vma; the function does not return any status. The caller is not required to check for failure because the put operation always succeeds.
